Memory management, context definitions, parsing, virtual machine operations, and API interfaces for JerryScript.

## Folders
- **[ecma](ecma/README.md)**: Memory management, helper functions, initialization, property lookup, literal storage, built-in objects, prototypes, and operations for ECMA in JerryScript.
- **[jcontext](jcontext/README.md)**: Defines global context, memory structures, and variables for the JerryScript engine.
- **[jmem](jmem/README.md)**: Memory allocation and management implementation and interfaces for JerryScript, including heap and pool management.
- **[jrt](jrt/README.md)**: Macros, error handling, standard library includes, type definitions, and utility functions for JerryScript.
- **[lit](lit/README.md)**: Character and string utilities, constants, and functions for Unicode, ASCII, and ECMAScript in JerryScript.
- **[parser](parser/README.md)**: JavaScript parsing, bytecode generation, and RegExp management components for JerryScript.
- **[vm](vm/README.md)**: ECMA opcode handlers, virtual machine stack management, and execution context definitions for JerryScript.

## Files
- **[config.h](config.h.md)**: Configuration settings for memory limits, data types, and garbage collection in the JerryScript engine.
- **[jerry-api.h](jerry-api.h.md)**: Header file for the JerryScript engine API, defining types, functions, and error handling.
- **[jerry-internal.h](jerry-internal.h.md)**: Internal interfaces for JerryScript, including function dispatch and object free callback handling.
- **[jerry-port.h](jerry-port.h.md)**: Header file for the JerryScript engine port, defining APIs for termination, I/O, logging, and time management.
- **[jerry-snapshot.h](jerry-snapshot.h.md)**: Defines the structure and version for JerryScript snapshot headers.
- **[jerry.c](jerry.c.md)**: Implementation of the JerryScript engine interface, including functions for initialization, execution, and manipulation of JavaScript objects and values.
